_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Antriksh Golf View I & II
project.address: Plot No. GH-005A, Sector 78, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301
project.tagline: Spacious Living with High Capital Restraints
project.description: Antriksh Golf View is a completed, highly occupied housing development in Sector 78, Noida, currently facing a severe registry embargo due to ₹273 Cr builder dues.
project.long_description: Antriksh Golf View is a major, ready-to-move-in residential development situated in Sector 78, Noida. Spanning a combined area of 19.8 acres across two phases, the development houses over 2,500 units in 27 high-rise towers rising up to G+21 and G+25 levels. Developed by Antriksh Developers & Promoters Private Limited (The Antriksh Group), the project features spacious 2, 3, and 4 BHK layouts with 80% open scaped areas and rich recreational centers. However, despite being heavily occupied by families, the project is under a critical financial and legal crisis. In May 2024, the Noida Authority issued a colossal ₹273 Crore Recovery Certificate (RC) against the developer for outstanding land dues. This has triggered a complete registry embargo, direct orders to attach and seal all unsold inventories, and requested criminal action under EOW, severely depressing resale valuations.
marketing_claims: Adjacent to Wipro SEZ IT hubs
Vastu-Compliant and Highly Spacious Corner Layouts
Massive Clubhouse with Pools and Indoor Sports Setup
Severe Per-Sqft Price Discounts (Up to 35% below compliant neighbors)
Active and Strong Apartment Owners Association (AOA) Fighting for Titles
project.project_risk_flag: Extreme: Builder under ₹273 Cr recovery certificate, attachment/sealing of unsold inventory, and active EOW criminal action.
registry_embargo_reasons: ₹273 Cr outstanding developer land dues to Noida Authority
Sovereign recovery certificate issued for asset attachment
Failure to deposit 25% rehabilitation plan fees

builder.name: The Antriksh Group
builder.company_overview: The Antriksh Group is a prominent real estate builder in northern India with over three decades of operational history across NCR. Headquartered in Delhi, the builder has developed numerous residential layouts in Noida, Ghaziabad, and Gurgaon. However, the developer carries severe financial risk, leading to regulatory crackdowns and major construction/registration delays on legacy properties.

unit_types.subtitle: Compact 2 BHK with park-facing balcony
unit_types.description: Standard 2 bedroom family layout with vitrified flooring, cross ventilation, and direct park views.

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Executive)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious 3 BHK with master bedroom dressing niche
unit_types.description: Spacious 3 BHK layout with ceramic and vitrified flooring, broad balcony space, and separate guest toilets.

connectivity.notes: Aqua Line metro access in 4 mins drive

connectivity.name: Wipro SEZ IT Hubs
connectivity.notes: Direct access to key IT hubs at Sector 80/132 links

connectivity.notes: CBSE school within the sector limits

assumptions: All pricing reflects deep registry-embargo discounts (up to 35% below compliant competitors).
GST is 0% as the structure is physically complete and occupied.
Standard bank loans are completely blocked. Transactions require cash-pools or direct family assets.

payment_plan.notes: Requires 100% self-funding due to total absence of bank mortgage sanctions.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Antriksh Golf View is an extremely high-risk, ready-to-move housing development offering deep cash-purchase price discounts, completely stalled registries, and a massive ₹273 Cr Noida Authority debt.
why_buy: Deepest Price Discounts: Available at ₹8,500 - ₹9,500/sqft—nearly 35% cheaper than neighboring compliant developments.
Highly Strategic Address: Positioned directly next to Wipro SEZ IT hubs and Sector 76 metro station corridors.
Robust Spatial Layouts: Spans 11.5+ acres with 80% open scaped landscapes and active community occupancy.
why_avoid: Total Registry Freeze: Absolutely no flat registrations can be executed due to the massive ₹273 Cr builder dues.
Complete Bank Mortgage Block: No leading public or private banks will authorize home loans here.
Asset Sealing Action: Active Noida Authority orders directing attachment and sealing of all unsold builder flats.
Builder Integrity Collapse: Distressed developer facing multiple criminal investigations (EOW and CBI).
decision_profile.best_for: Speculative high-risk cash buyers willing to wait years for Supreme Court or state rehab bailouts while living in the unit.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Standard home-loan dependent buyers, nuclear families requiring instant clean deeds, and conservative capital preservers.

buyerPersonas.headline: Bailout Bet Play
reasons: Buying at a 35% discount in cash, betting on a future state rehabilitation package to clear dues and open registries.
Direct proximity to Wipro SEZ offers steady rental appeal even under registration blocks.

riskRadar.description: Towers physically completed and inhabited by hundreds of families.
Blocked registries, active ₹273 Cr recovery certificates, and EOW litigation against the developer.
Requires cash-rich buyers; standard bank loan profiles are completely shut out.

transparency_checks.label: OC / CC Received
transparency_checks.details: Noida Authority has withheld completion certificates.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Completely stagnant values due to severe legal embargoes.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Decent rental pull from Wipro SEZ techies, though AOA management suffers from cash constraints.
investment_insights.market_desc: Heavy selling pressure from distressed owners trying to exit for cash-outs.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Highly restricted buyer pool due to the lack of bank funding.

location_highlights.title: IT Adjacency
location_highlights.description: Direct walking access to Wipro IT hub.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Developed Enclave
neighborhood_advantages.description: Mature infrastructure with high density and market yards.

persona_descriptions.INVESTOR: Cash-rich speculative investors betting on long-term government bailouts to unlock massive title premiums.
persona_descriptions.FAMILY: Budget-focused families prioritizing space over title security, operating via bilat agreements.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Aggressive — comfortable with severe litigation and registry blocks
persona_profile.motivation_note: Uncompromised spatial square footage next to IT hub at nearly half the price of normal complexes.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: We strongly advise standard buyers to AVOID Antriksh Golf View. While the per-sqft price is highly attractive, the colossal ₹273 Cr debt and total registration freeze represent an unacceptable title risk.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Not recommended for living in if you prioritize immediate title ownership or bank funding. If you are a cash buyer comfortable with legal delays, the space-per-rupee is high.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Highly speculative play. Stalled registries prevent any exit strategies for normal bank buyers.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Unsafe title custody for nuclear families; any family assets locked here cannot be easily mortgaged for education or medical emergencies.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Avoid unless you are a specialized distressed-asset fund operating on 10-year holding windows.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Average construction finish. Retains good sports courtyards, though maintenance suffers due to developer default.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Maximum risk. Outstanding RCs, property attachments, and criminal EOW litigation.
walk_away_conditions: Any transaction requiring standard home loans.
Refusal of seller to indemnify against Noida Authority dues.
negotiation_leverage: Squeeze sellers for maximum cash discounts of up to 40% against market value.
Highlight the EOW investigation to demand lower rates.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Do not buy. Standard users should redirect their capital to Mahagun Moderne or Nimbus Hyde Park.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Larger flat sizes and much lower starting price point.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Flawless legal titles, active registries, and full bank funding availability.
competitors.verdict: Nimbus Hyde Park is the vastly superior choice for any standard buyer. Only choose Antriksh if you have a massive cash-pool and can tolerate an absolute registry freeze.
competitors.price_delta_note: Antriksh is approx. Rs 2,500/sqft cheaper due to its severe legal distress.
